title: Crispy Pork Mu Shu Wraps
description: A Chinese-inspired dish featuring crispy pork and crunchy vegetables wrapped in a mildly sweet and savory mu shu wrap.
instructions: 1. In a small bowl, whisk together soy sauce, sugar, and 1 tablespoon vegetable oil to make the sauce.
2. In a large skillet or wok, heat the remaining 2 tablespoons vegetable oil over medium-high heat.
3. Add the pork shoulder and cook until browned on all sides, about 5-7 minutes.
4. Add the shredded cabbage and sliced scallions to the skillet. Cook until the cabbage is slightly wilted, about 2-3 minutes.
5. In a small bowl, mix together sesame seeds and sauce until well combined.
6. Add the sesame seed mixture to the skillet and stir to combine.
7. Warm the mu shu wraps according to package instructions.
8. Assemble the wraps by placing a portion of the pork and vegetable mixture onto each wrap, and serving immediately.
